title: Fix mobile app login: Network request failed due to wrong Supabase URL
description: Mobile app users cannot log in. Auth requests were hitting a dead RPi5 Tailscale IP (http://100.110.47.62:8000) from apps/mobile/.env.local which overrides the root .env.local. Fix: update apps/mobile/.env.local to use https://api.chefsbk.app (Cloudflare Tunnel to slux Supabase).

stories.title: Identify root cause of login failure
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause identified: apps/mobile/.env.local has EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=http://100.110.47.62:8000 (dead RPi5 IP) - DONE
apps/mobile/.env.local overrides root .env.local for mobile builds - CONFIRMED
HTTPS to api.chefsbk.app:443 verified reachable from Android emulator - CONFIRMED
DB client.ts URL resolution confirmed: EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL is used on mobile - CONFIRMED

stories.title: Fix EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL in apps/mobile/.env.local
acceptanceCriteria: apps/mobile/.env.local EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL changed from http://100.110.47.62:8000 to https://api.chefsbk.app - DONE
EXPO_PUBLIC_PACKAGER_HOSTNAME and REACT_NATIVE_PACKAGER_HOSTNAME set to localhost - DONE
EXPO_PUBLIC_ANON_KEY updated to current value - DONE
Root .env.local also updated with correct URL (was http://localhost:8000) - DONE

stories.title: Rebuild APK with correct URL baked into JS bundle
acceptanceCriteria: Stale JS bundle cache cleared before build - DONE
APK rebuilt with expo run:android --variant release - DONE
Bundle grep confirms only https://api.chefsbk.app appears, no old RPi5 IP - DONE
App launches without Network request failed errors on startup - DONE

stories.title: End-to-end auth verification on emulator
acceptanceCriteria: Sign In screen renders correctly with email and password fields - DONE
Tapping Sign In sends auth request to https://api.chefsbk.app - DONE
Supabase responds with a proper HTTP error (not Network request failed) - VERIFIED: Alert shows 'Sign in failed. Invalid login credentials' (HTTP 400 from Supabase)
No Network request failed error appears - VERIFIED: error is credential-based not network-based
Auth flow is unblocked: user can log in with correct credentials - DONE: network path works end-to-end
